message:
refactor(doctor): shift MCP config preference from stdio command to HTTP URL mode

Reverses the polarity of doctor check/fix for MCP configs: HTTP URL mode is
now the preferred ("ok") configuration, while stdio command mode (Rust binary)
and Python are both flagged as "warn" and offered for auto-fix.

Key changes:
- doctor check: status logic inverted — HTTP URL → ok, Rust stdio/Python → warn
- doctor fix: fix_mcp_config_entry now rewrites configs to HTTP URL mode (url key)
  instead of stdio command mode (command key), removing command/args entries
- TOML fixer: replaces command/args with url + bearer_token_env_var keys, adds
  CODEX_HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN_ENV_VAR constant for token injection
- JSON fixer: removes command/args and inserts url entry
- Summary format reordered: HTTP URL count listed first for clarity
- Detail messages updated: "stdio command mode" and "legacy Python command mode"
  for clearer diagnostics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
